publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-13 18:16:52 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Women's Student Government Association

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Manuscripts, Memorabilia, Printed Materials, Financial Records, Reports
did.abstract: Includes history, constitution, and bylaws; reports, minutes, correspondence, and notebooks of the Association President; reports, memoranda, and pamphlets of the Second Vice President; budgets, financial statements, checkbooks, correspondence, procedures, and reports of the House of Representatives, including the Judicial Committee and the Residence Committee; Executive Committee and W.S.G.A. Council minutes and reports; and subject files concerning student activities, campus organizations, dormitories, program evaluations, faculty committees, and other subjects. Also, Account books for 1938-40.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Women's Self-Government Association was formed in 1917 and succeeded the Sage College Association in having disciplinary jurisdiction over undergraduate women students at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes history, constitution, and bylaws; reports, minutes, correspondence, and notebooks of the Association President; reports, memoranda, and pamphlets of the Second Vice President; budgets, financial statements, checkbooks, correspondence, procedures, and reports of the House of Representatives, including the Judicial Committee and the Residence Committee; Executive Committee and W.S.G.A. Council minutes and reports; and subject files concerning student activities, campus organizations, dormitories, program evaluations, faculty committees, and other subjects. Also, Account books for 1938-40.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Women's Self-Government Association records, #37-9-1208. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Founder's Day and Fields of Work for Women
Minutes of Executive Committee and House of Representatives (Folder 1 of 2)
Minutes of Executive Committee and House of Representatives (Folder 2 of 2)
IAWS: Conference on Women in the Defence Decade
At Home - Guest list, Reports, etc.
Committee Minutes (Executive Comm., House of Reps.)
Senate Study of the Report of the Commission on Self-Governance
